title: viola cenisia
intro: Viola cenisia, also known as the Cenisian pansy or Alpine pansy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Viola genus. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its health benefits include soothing sore throats, calming coughs, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Viola cenisia often include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
